## Usage of Generative AI (Required)

- [ ] I can confirm that **this PR does not include any code that was majority created or modified by generative AI tools.**

Pull requests that do not check this box will be closed.

## Description

- What changes did you make to the project?
  - How did you make said changes? Describe the implementation.
- Does your PR fix any existing issues? If so, link them.
- How did you check to see if your changes worked?

> Depending on the changes made, also include the following:

- Does the change affect compatibility with legacy browsers?
